announcement.label: Private showroom access
announcement.message: Complimentary worldwide shipping on curated launches over $450.
announcement.secondary: Appointments, concierge sizing, and limited releases now live.

footer.description: Luxury Arabic and Islamic clothing presented with the restraint, shadow, and clarity of a dark premium showroom.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Kravexo. Crafted for premium modest wear.

hero.title: Modest silhouettes staged like luxury campaign pieces.
hero.description: A dark cinematic storefront for Arabic and Islamic clothing, built to spotlight fabric, cut, and finish with the restraint of premium product photography.

cards.stagingBody: Full-width campaign composition with controlled glow.
cards.mediaBody: Multi-angle cards prepared for real product imagery later.
cards.commerceBody: Ready for secure checkout, zoom, and richer product media.

fallback.title: The showroom is ready for live catalog highlights.
fallback.description: No featured product is currently published. Mark a live product as featured to restore the hero spotlight.

featuredCollections.title: Curated drops framed like editorial rooms.
featuredCollections.description: Every collection is presented as its own mood, tone, and silhouette world so the storefront feels closer to a luxury showroom than a generic fashion catalog.
featuredCollections.note: The card system is intentionally dark and restrained so future campaign imagery can sit on top of it without losing the premium tone.
featuredCollections.logicDescription: Hover states, tonal overlays, and editorial spacing are tuned to keep each collection feeling composed and high-value.
featuredCollections.emptyTitle: Curated collection worlds will appear here.
featuredCollections.emptyDescription: No featured collections are currently published. Feature a collection to populate this section.

featuredProducts.title: Showroom cards built to make the garment feel elevated.
featuredProducts.description: The products are presented with darker stages, reflective framing, refined metadata, and enough breathing room to read as premium objects.
featuredProducts.note: Real photography can replace the placeholder media surfaces later without changing the surrounding composition.
featuredProducts.focusDescription: Strong card hierarchy, premium hover behavior, and spotlighted price treatment for a more luxurious storefront rhythm.
featuredProducts.emptyTitle: Featured pieces will stage here once published.
featuredProducts.emptyDescription: No featured products are currently active. Feature catalog pieces to repopulate this grid.

newsletter.title: Reserve first access to drops, edits, and private showroom releases.
newsletter.description: A premium opt-in surface prepared for future launch alerts, tailored communication, and invite-led releases without breaking the dark showroom tone.
newsletter.formDescription: Simple now, with live validation and confirmation for the current build.
newsletter.footer: Campaign access, launch alerts, and collection previews
newsletter.successMessage: The private list form is now active in this build and your request was accepted.
newsletter.errorMessage: Enter a valid email address to submit the private list form.

shop.title: A catalog designed around display clarity.
shop.description: The shop keeps the same premium showroom rhythm while reading directly from the live catalog for active public products.
shop.note: Filtering, sorting, inventory state, and richer merchandising can expand on top of this structure without changing the visual language.
shop.emptyTitle: No public products are live yet.
shop.unavailableTitle: The public catalog is temporarily unavailable.
shop.emptyDescription: Once active products are published, they will appear here automatically.

index.title: Curated edits with their own mood and silhouette logic.
index.description: Collections are treated as luxury chapters rather than simple catalog tags, giving each product family a distinct narrative space.
index.note: Each collection now supports its own slug route and reads from the live catalog while preserving the current editorial card system.
index.emptyDescription: Publish active collections to populate this page.

detail.fallbackDescription: The route is live, but the collection data could not be loaded for this request.
detail.fallbackNote: Please retry once the live catalog connection is available again.
detail.stateTitle: Collection details could not be loaded right now.
detail.stateDescription: If this collection exists and is active, it will render here once the catalog connection is available.
detail.emptyTitle: No public products are currently assigned to this collection.
detail.unavailableTitle: This collection's products are temporarily unavailable.
detail.emptyDescription: Publish active products against this collection to populate this showroom.

product.fallbackTitle: The showroom piece is temporarily unavailable.
product.fallbackDescription: The product route is live, but the catalog data could not be loaded for this request.
product.fallbackNote: Please retry once the live catalog connection is available again.
product.stateTitle: This product could not be loaded right now.
product.stateDescription: If the product exists and is active, it will render here once the catalog connection is available.
product.storyHeading: Designed to hold presence under shadow, spotlight, and space.
product.signatureDescription: Presented inside the Kravexo dark showroom system for future editorial storytelling.

recommendations.titleFallback: Curated pieces that keep the same showroom mood.
recommendations.description: These recommendations are presented as a continuation of the product story, not a generic upsell strip, so the page keeps its luxury editorial rhythm.
recommendations.note: The existing product card system is reused here so related pieces stay visually consistent with the rest of the storefront.
recommendations.contextFallback: Related pieces can expand into richer recommendation logic once live catalog and customer data are connected.
recommendations.empty: Related products will appear here as the collection expands.

purchase.availableNote: Cart, quantity, and stock validation are now live for authenticated accounts.
purchase.unavailableNote: This product is not currently available for cart selection.

cart.unauthenticatedTitle: Sign in to access your saved showroom selections.
cart.unauthenticatedDescription: Cart persistence is live for authenticated customers. Sign in to review saved pieces, adjust quantities, and carry your selections forward to checkout.
cart.unauthenticatedNote: Guest cart support is intentionally reserved for a later phase. This first implementation keeps cart persistence clean and account-scoped.
cart.activeTitle: Your selected pieces are held in the Kravexo cart.
cart.activeDescription: Review your chosen variants, confirm available stock, and move the current selection into secure checkout when the basket feels right.
cart.activeNote: Quantities update against live variant stock, and successful payment now creates a real order record automatically.
cart.emptyTitle: Your cart is ready for its first showroom piece.
cart.emptyDescription: Your authenticated cart is active and ready. Once you add a product variant from a product page, it will appear here with live stock-aware quantity controls.
cart.emptyNote: Saved cart persistence is live for signed-in customers, even when the current basket is empty.
cart.accessTitle: Login to open your saved cart.
cart.accessDescription: Add-to-cart is already routed through authenticated saved carts. Sign in to review persisted selections and prepare for checkout.
cart.unconfiguredTitle: Cart persistence is not configured yet.
cart.unconfiguredDescription: Provide the required environment values for this deployment to enable live cart reads and mutations.
cart.errorTitle: The cart could not be loaded right now.
cart.errorDescription: Please retry shortly. Existing cart data remains stored if the request failed transiently.
cart.emptyStateDescription: Browse the showroom, choose a size from any product page, and your authenticated cart will persist that selection here.

summary.title: Held in the showroom.
summary.description: Your selections are saved to your authenticated account and can now move into a secure checkout session without changing the cart structure.
summary.shippingNoteBody: Address collection and payment confirmation continue in the secure payment step, while the resulting order syncs back into your account history.

checkout.title: Complete your order through a secure checkout session.
checkout.description: Your authenticated cart is prepared server-side, then finalized into a Kravexo order once payment succeeds.
checkout.note: Shipping and billing details are collected during secure checkout. The order record and item snapshots are synchronized back into your account after payment confirmation.
checkout.unconfiguredTitle: Secure checkout is not configured yet.
checkout.unconfiguredDescription: Add the required payment environment values for this deployment to enable checkout session creation and confirmation syncing.
checkout.errorTitle: The checkout session could not be prepared.
checkout.errorDescription: Review the cart and try again. Live stock and order validation run before checkout is opened.
checkout.emptyDescription: Add a product variant from any product page before starting checkout.

summary.title: Complete payment in a secure session.
summary.description: Pricing is derived server-side from your authenticated cart. Shipping and billing details are collected without trusting any client-submitted totals.
summary.pipelineBody: A pending order record is prepared before redirect. Payment confirmation then syncs the address snapshot and converts the cart once checkout succeeds.

login.title: A private entry point into the Kravexo showroom.
login.description: Sign in to access protected profile pages, saved selections, and future customer-only functionality.
login.note: The same refined visual language now extends into a complete account flow.

signup.title: Create a Kravexo account for protected access.
signup.description: Create your account to access protected pages, saved selections, and future customer services.
signup.note: The page keeps the same refined visual rhythm while now enforcing stronger password standards.
passwordRules: Include at least one uppercase letter and one lowercase letter.
Include at least one number and one symbol.

forgotPassword.title: Request a secure link to create a new password.
forgotPassword.description: Enter your account email and we will send a reset link that returns you to Kravexo.
forgotPassword.note: The reset flow keeps the same private-showroom visual language while moving password recovery into the live account system.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password for your Kravexo account.
resetPassword.description: Choose a strong new password to regain access to your protected account.
resetPassword.note: Use the reset link from your email to open this page with a valid recovery session.
resetPassword.stateTitle: Open the reset link from your email to continue.
resetPassword.stateDescription: For security, this page only accepts password updates from a valid recovery link.

account.description: This page is protected and loads the real signed-in customer profile together with recent account activity.
account.deniedNote: Admin access is restricted to Kravexo profiles with the admin role.
account.defaultNote: Recent orders now appear here after successful payment, and this protected account view is ready for fuller order history and address management next.
account.recentOrdersTitle: Recent order records are now live.
account.emptyOrders: No orders have been recorded for this account yet. Once a checkout succeeds, recent orders will appear here without any further UI restructuring.

admin.title: Operational access confirmed for the Kravexo admin surface.
admin.description: This route is protected by the account role guard, so only authenticated administrators can reach it.
admin.note: Catalog management, order oversight, and reporting can now build on top of a real admin access boundary.
admin.currentStateBody: Authentication, protected routing, live catalog reads, and role checks are now active. Product management and order oversight now continue in dedicated admin surfaces.

about.title: A premium modest wear brand built around shadow, craft, and control.
about.description: Kravexo aims to feel less like a conventional store and more like a private showroom, where every release is treated as a hero object.
about.note: This placeholder brand page is ready for future editorial photography, founder story, atelier process, and campaign video modules.

contact.title: Luxury retail tone, direct support structure.
contact.description: The contact surface is designed for concierge support, wholesale inquiry, press requests, and future customer service integration.
contact.note: This form now validates and confirms submissions in the current build, and it remains ready for future email or support-platform integration.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.successMessage: The contact form is now active in this build and your inquiry passed validation.
contact.errorMessage: Complete all fields with a valid email address before sending the inquiry.
contact.conciergeDescription: High-touch support for sizing, styling, launch access, and private purchase inquiries.
contact.studioDescription: Prepared for future showroom appointments, fittings, and campaign production notes.
